parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Source
parameters.description: Specifies what part of the operator to examine.

parameters.name: subkey
parameters.label: Subkey
parameters.description: If the object to be examined is a dictionary you can specify which element to examine here.

parameters.name: expression
parameters.label: Expression
parameters.description: When source is set to , enter your expression in this parameter.

parameters.name: expandclasses
parameters.label: Expand Classes
parameters.description: When true, complex object structures (example ) are further expanded.

parameters.name: maxlevels
parameters.label: Max Levels
parameters.description: Specify the maximum depth in which to expand a python object.

parameters.name: outputheaders
parameters.label: Output Headers
parameters.description: Turn this on to display the column names when is set to Table.

parameters.name: outputlevel
parameters.label: Output Level
parameters.description: Turn this on to output the column of the results.

parameters.name: outputkey
parameters.label: Output Key
parameters.description: Turn this on to output the column of the results.

parameters.name: outputtype
parameters.label: Output Type
parameters.description: Turn this on to output the column of the results.

parameters.name: outputvalue
parameters.label: Output Value
parameters.description: Turn this on to output the column of the results.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
